message:
feat: enter submits, alt+enter/ctrl+j inserts newline

bubbletea v1.3 has no kitty keyboard support, so shift+enter and
ctrl+enter are indistinguishable from plain enter in most terminals.
Use alt+enter (msg.Alt == true with KeyEnter) and ctrl+j (LF) as
the newline-without-submit bindings instead — both are reliable
cross-terminal.

- enter    → submit message
- alt+enter or ctrl+j → insert newline
- Disable the textarea's own InsertNewline binding so it does not
  compete with our enter handler.
- Remove ctrl+s as the send key; update /help.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -42,11 +42,12 @@ func slashCommandHelp() string {
 		"  /quit      Exit the TUI",
 		"",
 		"Keys:",
-		"  enter       New line in input",
-		"  ctrl+s      Send message",
-		"  pgup        Enter scroll mode (browse history)",
-		"  esc / i     Exit scroll mode",
-		"  tab         Expand/collapse most recent tool call",
+		"  enter            Send message",
+		"  alt+enter        New line in input",
+		"  ctrl+j           New line in input (alternative)",
+		"  pgup             Enter scroll mode (browse history)",
+		"  esc / i          Exit scroll mode",
+		"  tab              Expand/collapse most recent tool call",
 	}, "\n")
 }
